news.t: Moving Beyond Beta: BlackRock Embraces Active International Fixed Income

overview.description: The iShares Core International Aggregate Bond ETF (IAGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index composed of global non-U.S. dollar denominated investment grade bonds, hedged against currency fluctuations for USD investors. IAGG was launched on Nov 10, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg Global Aggregate x USD 10% Issuer Cap
